# MONOPOLYMERS

> Trusted distributor of plastic raw materials and polymers in India since 1996. 1000+ B2B customers, ₹100Cr+ annual turnover, multiple warehouses across India.

MONOPOLYMERS is a Mumbai-based polymer distribution company founded in 1996 by Mr. Jitendra Daga and Mr. Manoj Daga, building on a 50+ year Daga family legacy in India's plastic industry. The company supplies commodity and engineering polymers to manufacturers across packaging, automotive, consumer goods, infrastructure, agriculture, and electrical industries.

## Key facts

- Founded: 1996, Mumbai, India
- Founders: Mr. Jitendra Daga and Mr. Manoj Daga
- Family legacy: 50+ years in the plastic industry
- Customers: 1000+ active B2B manufacturers across India
- Annual turnover: ₹100 Crore+
- Offices: Mumbai and Vasai
- Warehousing: Multiple strategic warehouses across India
- Dispatch: Same-day and next-day for bulk orders
- Customer retention: Long-term relationships of 30+ years
- Phone: +91-93225-19925, +91-93220-60428, +91-90045-00225
- Email: monopolymers@yahoo.com

## Products supplied

Commodity polymers: PP (Polypropylene), LDPE, LLDPE, HDPE, PVC, GPPS, HIPS, EVA, PET.
Engineering polymers: ABS, PC (Polycarbonate), PA (Nylon), POM (Acetal), PMMA (Acrylic), TPR.

## Industries served

Packaging, automotive, consumer goods, infrastructure and construction, agriculture, electrical and electronics, household and appliances, and industrial manufacturing.
